title: Caramelized Lemon Spice Skewers
description: A crispy and herbal dish featuring all-purpose seasoning that gets caramelized for a show-off Turkish touch, sugar-free-friendly.
instructions: Slice the lemon and coat with all-purpose seasoning mix. Place on skewers in pairs, alternating between seasoned slices.
Brush each side of the skewers generously with sugar-free caramel sauce.
Grill skewers for 2-3 minutes per side until golden brown and caramelized. Watch closely as they can burn quickly.
Squeeze the remaining lemon juice over the grilled skewers and serve warm.
